message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam noteBorderColor black
skinparam noteFontStyle bold

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Server" as Server

note over Client, Server: "Authentication"
Client -> Server: 1 REQUEST (AuthenticationRequest)
Server --> Client: 2.1 ACCEPT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)
Server --> Client: 2.2 REJECT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)

note over Client, Server: "Request Delete a file"
Client -> Server: 3 REQUEST (DeleteFolderRequest)
Server --> Client: 4.1 ACCEPT-REQUEST (DeleteFolderResponse)
Server --> Client: 4.2 REJECT-REQUEST (DeleteFolderResponse)

@enduml
